story.text:
# 📖 ⿻ Act XXIX: Window Closes
**act** · shared · knowledge · plurality

The Window That Closes. 2-3 year critical window before surveillance calcifies.
> *The best time to plant a tree was twenty years ago. The second best time is now. The worst time is next year—when the ground may be paved.*

## Edges out

- *follows* → [[⿻ Act XXX: Ceremony Complete]]

## Edges in

- [[⿻ Act XXVIII: Laws Enable]] *follows* →
